parameters.query: WITH body AS (SELECT convert_from(decode($1, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb AS j), new_app AS (INSERT INTO apps (name) SELECT j->>'name' FROM body RETURNING id), new_ver AS (INSERT INTO app_versions (app_id, version, metadata, steps, blockly_state) SELECT id, 1, (SELECT j->'metadata' FROM body), (SELECT j->'steps' FROM body), (SELECT j->'blockly_state' FROM body) FROM new_app RETURNING app_id) SELECT app_id::text AS id FROM new_ver
